description: CSAM hash-matching provider integration: Replace the CSAMGuard stub with a real PhotoDNA-compatible hash matcher. Since no actual NCMEC/PhotoDNA partnership keys are available, implement a provider adapter pattern with: (1) a CSAMHashProvider interface, (2) a PhotoDNAProvider adapter that calls the PhotoDNA Cloud API, (3) a TestHashProvider that checks against NCMEC test hash set, (4) hash extraction at upload edge (before storage), (5) on match: block storage, log to dedicated csam_reports table schema, emit paging event to legal contact. Keep UGC_MEDIA_ENABLED flag OFF unless a real provider is configured. Add integration test using test hashes that proves rejection in <500ms.
steps: 1. Add new types in packages/moderation/src/types.ts: CSAMHashProvider interface (checkHash, reportMatch, getProviderName), CSAMReport type (hash, source, timestamp, reportId, providerResponse), CSAMConfig type (provider, legalContactEmail, pagingWebhookUrl, enabledApps)

2. Create packages/moderation/src/services/csam-hash-provider.ts with: (a) abstract CSAMHashProvider interface, (b) PhotoDNAProvider class that calls Microsoft PhotoDNA Cloud REST API (POST /v1.0/Match with SHA-256 hash), (c) TestHashProvider class with a built-in set of known NCMEC test hashes for integration testing, (d) NullProvider that always throws (fail-closed default)

3. Refactor packages/moderation/src/services/csam-matcher.ts: rename CSAMGuard to CSAMGuardLegacy (keep for backward compat), create new CSAMMatchService class that accepts a CSAMHashProvider, performs hash check, on match emits event to csam_reports table + calls paging webhook, has <500ms timeout enforcement via AbortController
4. Update packages/moderation/src/services/image-moderator.ts: in moderateWithHash(), replace CSAMMatcherInterface usage with new CSAMMatchService, ensure hash check happens BEFORE any storage

5. Create packages/moderation/src/services/csam-matcher.test.ts: test with TestHashProvider that known test hashes are rejected, unknown hashes pass through, timeout enforcement works, NullProvider throws correctly, paging webhook is called on match
6. Update packages/moderation/src/index.ts to export new CSAMMatchService and CSAMHashProvider types
7. Update services/moderation-worker/src/handlers/image-handler.ts to wire CSAMMatchService into the pipeline before classification
acceptance_criteria: CSAMMatchService with TestHashProvider rejects known test hashes in <500ms (verified by test with timing assertion)
Unknown hashes pass through and proceed to normal classification
On match: a CSAMReport event is generated with hash, source, timestamp
NullProvider (no config) throws fail-closed error preventing media acceptance
All existing tests continue to pass (backward compatibility via CSAMGuardLegacy)
pnpm turbo typecheck test build lint --filter=@quant/moderation... passes
findings: All acceptance criteria met. 17 new tests pass including timing assertion (<500ms). Existing csam-matcher.test.ts (4 tests) still passes with CSAMGuard backward compat alias. Prettier ran via lint-staged on commit. The legalContactEmail param is accepted in CSAMMatchService constructor but not stored as a field since it has no consumer yet - future features can add email alerting.
